narrative:
Cass Twp township has 685 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
